title: podman-remote: exec: Error: unrecognized channel in header: 1, 0-3 supported
body:
Window 1:
```console
$ MYSOCK=unix:/tmp/mypodmansock
$ ./bin/podman --log-level=debug system service --timeout=0 $MYSOCK
```
Window 2:
```console
$ MYSOCK=unix:/tmp/mypodmansock
$ $ ./bin/podman-remote --url $MYSOCK run --name foo -d alpine top
88ea90c55e35429bf11ce08609bf54cb4ca8b91d35e3fe71ede1a2835bdcc863
$ ./bin/podman-remote --url $MYSOCK exec foo date
Error: unrecognized channel in header: 1, 0-3 supported
```
(note that 'date' output never appears).

master @ 142e62cb45e54a0e77b598c76886e5cff0cdbb45

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Looks like this has been fixed.
